sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: International Seaways stock hits all-time high of 82.09 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: International Seaways Inc. (INSW) stock has reached a new all-time high of $82.09, closing in on its 52-week peak. This surge comes after a 158% total return over the last year and strong financial results for Q4 2025, including beating earnings expectations and declaring a record dividend. Analysts at BTIG and Jefferies have responded positively by raising price targets and initiating Buy ratings, respectively.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Glaukos Corp beats Q1 2026 forecasts, stock dips
feed.summary: Glaukos Corp (GKOS) reported strong Q1 2026 results, exceeding revenue and EPS forecasts with significant year-over-year growth, driven by its Glaucoma and Corneal Health franchises. Despite the positive financial performance and raised full-year revenue guidance, the stock experienced a slight dip in after-hours trading. The company is confident in its strategic focus on product innovation, market expansion, and addressing challenges like rising operating expenses and competitive pressures.

feed.title: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (DECK): Under-the-Radar Stock Pick from David Einhorn
feed.summary: David Einhorn's Greenlight Capital has added Deckers Outdoor Corporation (DECK) to its portfolio, with nearly 300,000 shares in Q4 2025. Deckers is recognized for its strong brand momentum, particularly with the HOKA brand which saw significant revenue growth and retail expansion. The company maintains high margins through direct-to-consumer sales and a clean balance sheet with over $1.5 billion in cash and no debt.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Align Technology beats Q1 2026 forecasts with strong growth
feed.summary: Align Technology (ALGN) reported strong financial results for Q1 2026, surpassing earnings and revenue forecasts with an EPS of $2.58 and revenue of $1.04 billion, driven by record shipments in its Clear Aligner segment. The company's stock saw a modest increase post-earnings, and Align provided optimistic guidance for Q2 2026 and reaffirmed its full-year 2026 outlook, focusing on continued innovation and market expansion despite macroeconomic uncertainties.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Alphabet Q1 2026 earnings soar, stock dips
feed.summary: Alphabet (GOOG) reported exceptional Q1 2026 earnings, with EPS of $5.11 and revenue of $109.9 billion, both significantly exceeding analyst forecasts. Despite these strong results, including a 63% year-over-year surge in Google Cloud revenue, the company's stock experienced a slight dip of 0.61% in after-hours trading. The earnings call highlighted Alphabet's strategic investments in AI and cloud infrastructure, driving growth and expanding its market reach, while also addressing future CapEx plans and the increasing demand for AI compute resources.

feed.title: FDA search for baby formula contamination finds little
feed.summary: The FDA's recent search for baby formula contamination has yielded minimal findings. This news comes amidst a backdrop of rising home prices in Chicago, a boom in private clubs, and a significant makeover project for Water Tower Place.

feed.title: Ball Corporation declares $0.20 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Ball Corporation (NYSE:BALL) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026. The company also announced its first-quarter 2026 earnings report will be released on May 5, 2026, followed by a conference call. Recent analyst adjustments to targets reflect strong performance, with InvestingPro analysis suggesting the stock is currently undervalued.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical Insider Sold Shares Worth $291,887, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) recently sold shares valued at $291,887, as indicated by a filing with the SEC. The article also provides an overview of Intuitive Surgical's business, including its specialization in robotic surgical assistance systems like the da Vinci. The company's financial performance and analyst ratings are also mentioned.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NASDAQ: CDW) holds 7.57% stake in CDW
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.57% passive stake in CDW (NASDAQ: CDW), as per a Schedule 13G filing. This translates to beneficial ownership of 9,747,914 shares of CDW Common Stock, with Vanguard holding sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 1,327,505 shares. The Schedule 13G indicates a passive investment intent, not an active takeover.

feed.title: Gilead (NASDAQ: GILD) CEO sells 10,000 shares in planned trade
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences Chairman & CEO Daniel O'Day sold 10,000 shares of common stock on April 28, 2026, as part of a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in February 2025. The sales were executed at prices around $128.79 and $130.01 per share. Following these transactions, O'Day still holds over 600,000 shares of Gilead common stock, indicating these sales represent routine portfolio management.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics reported Q1 revenue of $783 million and a 4.7% organic constant-currency revenue growth, exceeding internal expectations despite short-term challenges. The company highlighted strong subscription revenue growth, progress in AI-driven tools like Digital Media Forensics, and reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance, including a significant share repurchase program and a dividend increase. Management also addressed the increasing integration of AI into client workflows and its strategic approach to monetization.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 25.48M-share stake in Cintas (CTAS) in Schedule 13G
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 25,480,477 shares in Cintas (CTAS), representing 6.36% of the common stock. The filing specifies that Vanguard has sole voting power over 3,396,072 shares and sole dispositive power over all 25,480,477 shares. These holdings include securities managed for Vanguard funds and other accounts, indicating an investment purpose rather than an intent to influence company control.

feed.title: Regency Centers Reports Strong Q1 2026 Earnings and Outlook
feed.summary: Regency Centers (REG) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings with increased net income, FFO, and same-property NOI, driven by robust leasing activity and rent growth. The company maintained high occupancy, expanded its development pipeline, and strengthened its balance sheet while reaffirming its 2026 guidance with increased investment plans. An analyst has rated REG stock as a Buy with an $88.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as Outperform.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (CMS) reports 7.50% stake, 23.1M shares
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.50% stake in CMS Energy Corp, holding 23,113,756 shares as of March 31, 2026. The Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 3,236,459 shares. This passive investment reflects typical investment management activities.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 21.96M-share stake in CBRE (NYSE: CBRE)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.43% stake in CBRE Group Inc., holding 21,955,428 common shares as of March 31, 2026. This passive investment, disclosed via a Schedule 13G filing, indicates Vanguard exercises sole voting power over 2,904,409 shares and sole dispositive power over all 21,955,428 shares. The filing underscores Vanguard's position as a significant passive shareholder without an activist intent.

feed.title: Ball sets June 15 dividend payment as Q1 results arrive May 5
feed.summary: Ball Corporation declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026. The company also announced that its First Quarter 2026 earnings will be released on May 5, 2026, before market open, followed by a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] COLGATE PALMOLIVE CO Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G indicating a passive investment in Colgate-Palmolive Co (CL), beneficially owning 60,404,276 shares, which represents 7.52% of the class. The filing clarifies that Vanguard has sole voting power for 8,184,452 shares and sole dispositive power for all 60,404,276 shares, held across various Vanguard-managed funds and accounts. This disclosure signifies a substantial institutional ownership position without an activist intent.

feed.title: Ackman’s Pershing Square IPO Tests Hedge Fund Wrappers - ARK Innovation ETF (BATS:ARKK), Global X Guru In
feed.summary: Bill Ackman's $5 billion Pershing Square USA IPO, structured as a closed-end fund mirroring his flagship hedge fund but without performance fees, raises questions about the continued need for such "hedge fund wrappers" given the availability of comparable actively managed ETFs. The IPO will test investor appetite for closed-end funds in a market increasingly served by ETFs that offer similar access to hedge fund strategies. Its performance relative to net asset value will provide insights into investor preferences for listed fund structures in the current environment.

feed.title: Green Brick Partners Announces Multi-Year Financial Statement Restatement
feed.summary: Green Brick Partners announced it will restate financial statements for 2023-2025 to correct how residential unit revenue and closing cost incentives were reported. While the restatement will lower reported revenue and average sales prices, the company emphasized that gross profit, operating income, net income, EPS, cash flow, equity, and debt covenant compliance remain unchanged. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates GRBK as Outperform due to strong financial quality and inexpensive P/E, despite some near-term housing-cycle headwinds.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 7.49% stake in Costco (NASDAQ: COST) via Schedule 13G
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.49% beneficial ownership stake in Costco Wholesale Corp (NASDAQ: COST) through a Schedule 13G SEC filing. This represents 33,256,639 shares of Common Stock as of March 31, 2026, with Vanguard possessing sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 4,409,191 shares, indicating a passive investment. The filing was signed by Vanguard's Head of Global Fund Administration on April 29, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 19.8M shares of Cigna Group (NYSE: CI) holding 7.51%
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 19,814,433 shares of Cigna Group (NYSE: CI) common stock, which represents 7.51% of the class as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates Vanguard possesses sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 2,692,364 shares. This information was disclosed in a SCHEDULE 13G filing signed on April 29, 2026.

feed.title: Medtronic Advances First Clinical Cases with Stealth AXiS™ Surgical System, Demonstrating the Power of Connected Smart Ecosystems Across Neurosurgery
feed.summary: Medtronic has announced the successful completion of the first clinical cases using its new Stealth AXiS™ Surgical System, following recent FDA clearances. This system integrates AI-driven planning, advanced navigation, and robotic guidance for precise neurosurgery, forming part of Medtronic’s AiBLE™ smart ecosystem. Surgeons have highlighted its impact on real-time alignment, workflow efficiency, and the unification of preoperative planning with intraoperative intelligence.

feed.title: Vanguard holds 7.56% of Corteva Inc (CTVA) in Schedule 13G
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 50,788,356 shares of Corteva Inc. (CTVA), which represents 7.56% of the company's common stock as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made in a Schedule 13G filing, indicating a passive investment rather than an attempt to influence control of the issuer. Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 6,712,502 shares, held through various Vanguard funds and managed accounts.

feed.title: FCC Approves Station Swaps Between Scripps and Gray Media
feed.summary: The FCC has approved station swaps between Scripps and Gray Media, creating new duopolies for both groups. The deal, first announced in July 2025, involved an equal value exchange of licenses with no cash. The FCC rejected arguments that the swaps would give the station groups excessive power in retransmission consent negotiations.

feed.title: GP-Act III Adjourns Meeting to Seek Extension Approval
feed.summary: GP-Act III Acquisition Corporation (GPAT) adjourned its extraordinary general meeting on April 29 to May 6, seeking shareholder approval to extend its business combination and trust liquidation deadlines. This extension, from May 13 to November 13, 2026, would provide the SPAC more time to finalize a deal and preserve shareholder value. The company also allowed investors to reverse previous redemption requests, aiming to maintain its cash position.

feed.title: UBS Nudges Booking Holdings (BKNG) Price Target by $1
feed.summary: UBS raised its price target on Booking Holdings (BKNG) from $259 to $260 and maintained a Buy rating, anticipating near-term uncertainty from geopolitical risks but expecting normalization by 2027. Separately, Deutsche Bank adjusted its price target to $210 after BKNG's 25-to-1 stock split, noting mixed travel signals and potential European softness. Booking Holdings, known for brands like Booking.com and Priceline, is facing downward pressure on its stock price.

feed.title: When is Amazon Prime Day 2026? Amazon confirms June sale
feed.summary: Amazon has confirmed that its Prime Day 2026 event will take place in June, earlier than its usual July timeframe. While exact dates are yet to be announced, this shift means shoppers should prepare for deals sooner, with early discounts expected to start in late May or early June. Prime Day deals are exclusive to Amazon Prime members, and the article provides information on membership benefits and discounted options.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) Issues FY 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) has issued its FY 2026 earnings guidance, projecting an EPS of $12.50-$12.75 and revenue of $2.5 billion-$2.6 billion, surpassing consensus EPS estimates. Following the announcement, the company's stock rose by 4.6%. The article also details recent analyst ratings, insider transactions, and institutional ownership changes for TYL.

feed.title: 30 Years of Million Mile Drivers: How J.B. Hunt Recognizes Safety and Raises the Bar
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc. celebrated its 30th annual Million Mile celebration, honoring 54 drivers for achieving between 2 and 5 million accident-free miles. This event highlights the company's commitment to safety and recognizes drivers who demonstrate exceptional focus and discipline on the road. The celebration included time with company leadership, a Walk of Fame, and the etching of drivers' names onto the Million Mile Wall.

feed.title: AI and Cloud push Alphabet into a new phase of growth
feed.summary: Alphabet's Q1 2026 results show a strong performance driven by its core advertising business and impressive growth in Google Cloud, fueled by AI investments. The company's revenue reached $109.9 billion, with operating income up 30% year-on-year, demonstrating increased efficiency despite high capital expenditure. This performance positions Alphabet as a more diversified technology platform, with AI becoming a significant driver of financial success beyond its traditional advertising dominance.

feed.title: 30 Years of Million Mile Drivers: How J.B. Hunt Recognizes Safety and Raises the Bar
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt honored 54 drivers for achieving 2, 3, 4, and 5 million accident-free miles as part of its annual Million Mile celebration, marking the program's 30th anniversary. The event included a Walk of Fame at the company headquarters, recognizing drivers and their families for their commitment to safety. J.B. Hunt has recognized over 5,000 drivers for achieving at least one million safe miles, reinforcing its focus on safety through ongoing training and technology investments.

feed.title: 30 Years of Million Mile Drivers: How J.B. Hunt Recognizes Safety and Raises the Bar
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt honored 54 drivers for achieving multimillion-mile safety milestones at its 30th annual Million Mile celebration. This event recognized drivers for 2, 3, 4, and 5 million accident-free miles, emphasizing the company's commitment to safety and continued investment in training and technology to support its drivers. The celebration brought drivers and their families to corporate headquarters for recognition and interaction with company leadership.

feed.title: Vertex Director Upadhyay to Step Down Amid CFO Move
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals announced that director Suketu Upadhyay will not seek re-election at the company’s 2026 annual meeting due to a new role as CFO of Incyte Corporation. The board size will consequently reduce to ten members. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates VRTX as "Outperform" based on strong fundamentals and a positive earnings outlook, despite technical momentum and earnings volatility concerns.

feed.title: A Look at Devon Energy Corp (DVN) After 3.2% Gain -- GF Value $4
feed.summary: Devon Energy Corp (DVN) shares recently rose by 3.2% to $51.08, but GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates the stock is 4.7% overvalued compared to its estimated fair value of $48.80. Despite an above-average GF Score™ of 73/100, highlighting strengths in profitability and valuation, the overvaluation and low momentum rank suggest caution for investors. The company's P/E ratio of 12.2x is also significantly higher than its 5-year median, further supporting the overvaluation assessment.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 55,917,468 Blackstone shares (BX) — 7.53% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.53% stake in Blackstone Inc. (BX), amounting to 55,917,468 shares as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares, but sole voting power over 7,607,674 shares, clarifying the distinction in control rights across its various entities and funds. The filing emphasizes transparency regarding institutional ownership and its implications for corporate governance.

feed.title: Dow Inc (DOW) Shares Surge 4.0% -- What GF Score of 64 Tells Inv
feed.summary: Dow Inc (DOW) shares surged 4.0% to $39.55 on April 29, 2026. Despite a GF Score™ of 64/100, indicating above-average potential, the GF Value™ suggests the stock is 2.1% overvalued. The article highlights that while DOW's forward P/E is below its historical median, the lack of insider transactions over the last three months signals a cautious stance from executives regarding its current price levels.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Inc (DHI) Shares Fall 3.0% -- What GF Score of 93 Tells Investors
feed.summary: D.R. Horton Inc (DHI) shares recently fell 3.0%, closing at $151.65, though the stock has seen significant gains over the past year. GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates DHI is slightly overvalued, trading 0.6% above its intrinsic value of $150.75, with its current P/E ratio of 14.2x notably higher than its 5-year median. Despite this, DHI holds a strong GF Score™ of 93/100, driven by excellent profitability and growth ratings, but insider activity has been neutral, suggesting a cautious outlook.

feed.title: AEP (AEP) boosts authorized shares to 900M and approves ESPP, pay
feed.summary: American Electric Power Company, Inc. (AEP) shareholders approved an increase in authorized common stock from 600 million to 900 million shares, set to become effective upon filing in New York. Shareholders also ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the 2026 auditor, approved the AEP Employee Stock Purchase Plan, and supported named executive officer compensation on an advisory basis. Additionally, the Board accelerated the effective date of a committee name change to the Nomination, Governance & Compensation Committee to May 1, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 7.69M shares in Camden Property Trust (NYSE: CPT)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 7,688,703 shares, representing 7.34% of Camden Property Trust's common stock, through a SCHEDULE 13G SEC filing. This filing indicates that Vanguard holds sole voting power for 976,870 shares and sole dispositive power for all 7,688,703 shares. The document was signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, on April 29, 2026.

feed.title: Equinix stock plunges as Q1 earnings fall short of expectations (EQIX:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) stock declined after its first-quarter earnings missed analyst estimates, despite the company raising its full-year guidance. Shares were down 5.24% in after-market trading on Wednesday. The data center REIT reported adjusted FFO per share for Q1 that fell short of expectations.

feed.title: FMC Corp. stock underperforms Wednesday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: FMC Corp. (FMC) stock fell 4.00% to $14.65 on Wednesday, underperforming the broader market. This marked the stock's second consecutive day of losses, as the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average also experienced declines.

feed.title: A Look At State Street (STT) Valuation As Tokenized Fund Platform And Nasdaq 100 ETF Plans Progress
feed.summary: State Street (STT) is planning to launch a tokenized fund servicing platform by the end of 2026 and has also announced a new Nasdaq 100 ETF. While analysts view STT as slightly overvalued with a fair value of $148.46, Simply Wall St's DCF model suggests it might be undervalued at $178.02 compared to its current price of $152.48. The article highlights both the opportunities and risks associated with these new ventures and the conflicting valuation perspectives.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) EVP Peter Sefzik Sells 20,000 Shares
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp's EVP Peter Sefzik sold 20,000 shares of the company's stock for over $1 million, reducing his holdings by 9.55%. This occurred after the bank reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $0.83 EPS and announcing a $0.40 quarterly dividend. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $57.11 for FITB.

feed.title: Welltower Inc. (WELL) Announces Resale and OP Unit Prospectus Su
feed.summary: Welltower Inc. (WELL) announced filings with the SEC to register up to 138,740 shares of common stock for resale, issued in exchange for securities from recent property acquisitions. Additionally, the company registered up to 176,172 common shares for potential issuance if holders of Welltower OP LLC's Class A common units tender them for redemption. These actions are part of Welltower's financial strategy to manage equity and support growth through acquisitions.

feed.title: A £2 million legacy for Fife's future generations
feed.summary: ExxonMobil is donating up to £2 million in industrial equipment to Fife College, marking a final contribution as its Fife Ethylene Plant (FEP) ceases production. This equipment will support hands-on learning and skill development for future generations of students in Fife, enhancing their job readiness in various technical fields. The generous gift aims to leave a lasting legacy for the community that supported FEP for over 40 years.

feed.title: Green Brick Partners: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Green Brick Partners Inc. reported its Q1 earnings, with net income of $60.9 million. The real estate investment company, based in Plano, Texas, also announced earnings of $1.39 per share and revenue of $456 million for the period. This financial summary was generated using data from Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: First Mid Names Matt Smith CEO and President; Joe Dively to
feed.summary: First Mid Bancshares, Inc. announced a leadership transition, naming Matthew K. Smith as the new CEO and President, effective July 1, 2026. The current Chairman and CEO, Joseph R. Dively, will transition to Executive Chairman of the Board. This succession plan follows a multi-year process and aims to ensure continued growth and stability for the company.

feed.title: Matt Smith to succeed Dively as First Mid (NASDAQ: FMBH) CEO
feed.summary: First Mid Bancshares, Inc. announced a leadership transition, naming Matthew K. Smith as the new Chief Executive Officer and President, effective July 1, 2026. Current CEO Joseph R. Dively will transition to Executive Chair, focusing on strategic oversight and mergers and acquisitions. Smith, currently President, has been instrumental in the company's growth, with total assets increasing from $2.8 billion to $9.3 billion during his tenure.

feed.title: Gartner: Supply chain orgs struggle to add AI onto legacy systems
feed.summary: A Gartner survey found that 56% of chief supply chain officers face significant challenges integrating AI with legacy systems and processes. The report highlights that simply bolting AI onto old infrastructure often locks in existing inefficiencies rather than driving substantial improvements. Leading CSCOs are reimagining entire supply chain operating models, team roles, and technology layers to build "AI-native" supply chains for greater impact.

feed.title: Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX): Stephen Mandel Opens New Position in Medical Device Firm
feed.summary: Stephen Mandel's Lone Pine Capital has initiated a new position in Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX) during the fourth quarter of 2025, acquiring over 200,000 shares. Despite the company beating Q1 estimates for revenue and EPS, a lowered full-year 2026 guidance led to stock price volatility, which some hedge funds interpret as a strategic move to set up future beat-and-raise quarters. The article highlights strong organic growth in BSX's Cardiovascular segment and the success of its Pulsed Field Ablation (PFA) platform and WATCHMAN device.
